channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: IO Interactive ends MindsEye publishing collaboration
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Build A Rocket Boy to assume publishing responsibilities going forward.

IO Interactive has announced the conclusion of its publishing collaboration with developer Build A Rocket Boy on single-player action adventure game MindsEye, with Build A Rocket Boy assuming sole publishing responsibilities going forward. The previously planned Hitman cross-over event within MindsEye will no longer be released.

Here are the details:

IOI Partners’ involvement with MindsEye comes to an end, except for any essential transitional functions required to transfer publisher-of-record status to Build A Rocket Boy. Build A Rocket Boy will assume sole publishing responsibilities going forward, ensuring continuity for the MindsEye community and all partners. IOI Partners and BARB are coordinating closely to ensure a seamless transition over the coming weeks.

In light of this separation, the Hitman mission announced in June 2025, planned as a crossover event within MindsEye, will no longer be released. However, BARB plans on working with partners on other projects in the future. Both IOI Partners and Build A Rocket Boy recognize the anticipation this collaboration generated among the community and express their appreciation for the support shown by the players.

MindsEye launched for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on June 10, 2025 to less than favorable reception.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/io-interactive-ends-mindseye-publishing-collaboration
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Ubisoft and developer Behaviour Interactive have announced Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, Ubisoft Store), and GeForce NOW. It will launch on June 11.

Here is an overview of the game, via Ubisoft:

About

A dynamic team-based twist on the world’s favorite family board game from Hasbro, Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains offers reimagined gameplay with cinematic moments, themed spaces, and dynamic elements so that no two matches are the same. Build teams with iconic Star Wars heroes and villains, each of whom brings unique abilities that can shape strategy and turn the tide in your favor with every roll of the dice. Teamwork and hero combinations play a pivotal role in securing victory.

Key Features

  • Custom Monopoly board featuring iconic locations from the Star Wars saga and reimagined special tiles.
  • Competitive two-versus-two and three-versus-three modes.
  • Choose from a large roster of characters like Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Darth Vader, Darth Maul, and more.
  • Distinct hero abilities, creating a new adventure every match.
  • Dice challenges and new GO events that introduce game-altering twists.

Watch a teaser trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery. A full reveal is planned for April 29.

Teaser Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/monopoly-star-wars-heroes-vs-villains-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: TAMASHIKA launches April 10 for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

New first-person shooter from quicktequila.

Frenetic first-person shooter TAMASHIKA will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam on APril 10, publisher EDGLRD and developer quicktequila announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via EDGLRD:

About

Those eager to learn more about TAMASHIKA are invited to check out a new blog post from the developer, available here. Within, developer Vidhvat (quicktequila) speaks to TAMASHIKA‘s multi-year, multi-country journey and details how the game has evolved since its 2025 Steam Next Fest demo.

With TAMASHIKA, players are thrust into a psychedelic trance of shifting corridors, where every day brings a new challenge. As a rogue spirit armed with only a semi-auto pistol and tanto blade, players must blink, parry and shoot their way through a procedurally generated labyrinth, alive with traps and enemies designed to guide you deeper into FLOW.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Master Simplicity – One gun, one blade—no loadouts, no excuses. CONCENTRATE to pierce the illusion of chaos and master the rhythm.
  • Absorb Vivid Visuals – A DREAMSCAPE of rainbow psychedelia that dances with you, filled with colorful, hand-drawn animations.
  • Enter the Daily Labyrinth – The labyrinthine corridors shuffle on a fixed pattern. Once a day, roughly 300 unique pieces are shuffled to create a new level filled with twists, turns, traps and enemies. PAY ATTENTION to discern patterns, find secrets and catch the surprises that any random day could have.
  • Compete on the Leaderboards – Practice your way into the FLOW STATE. Catch the pulse of the day’s rhythm and compete with others on the leaderboards.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/tamashika-launches-april-10-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
